title: Junior SEO Specialist at Dove India

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Dove India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Dove India in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Dove India:
Dove India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dove India!
